title: Israel putting Iran truce ‘under severe strain’, warns the EU
summary_full: “Israeli actions are putting the US-Iran ceasefire under severe strain“, Kallas wrote on X. She added that “Israel’s right to defend itself does not justify inflicting such massive destruction”
summary_public: “Israeli actions are putting the US-Iran ceasefire under severe strain“, Kallas wrote on X. She added that “Israel’s right to defend itself does not justify inflicting such massive destruction”
